reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Attack path requires c-kzg-4844 library to return ≠128 cells from ComputeCells(). Function has 2 call sites: (1) beacon-chain/execution/engine_client.go:700 processing Engine API data from EL (SEMI_TRUSTED per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json lines 107-117, comment on line 706 states 'We trust the execution layer'), (2) beacon-chain/rpc/prysm/v1alpha1/validator/proposer.go:410 processing local validator RPC data (SEMI_TRUSTED per lines 119-125 'under operator control'). Both paths rely solely on trusted/semi-trusted components being buggy or compromised, outside the security model. No untrusted P2P attack vector exists.
